---
title: "Publications"
---

## Publications

This page lists publications, preprints, and talks. Replace the placeholder entries below with your preferred citation style and links.

## Selected Publications

1. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Journal or Conference Name* volume(issue), pages (year). [PDF](https://example.com) | [DOI](https://doi.org/example-doi) | [Code](https://github.com/example)
2. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Journal or Conference Name* volume(issue), pages (year). [PDF](https://example.com) | [DOI](https://doi.org/example-doi)
3. **Author list**, "Paper title," *Journal or Conference Name* volume(issue), pages (year). [PDF](https://example.com)

## Preprints

1. **Author list**, "Preprint title," *arXiv* (year). [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/example) | [PDF](https://example.com)
2. **Author list**, "Working title," *Under review* (year). [Manuscript](https://example.com)

## Talks and Posters

1. **Talk title**, Event or Seminar Name, Location (year). [Slides](https://example.com)
2. **Poster title**, Conference Name, Location (year). [Poster PDF](https://example.com)
3. **Talk or poster title**, Host Institution or Workshop, Location (year). [Details](https://example.com)

## Notes

- Replace each placeholder with your preferred citation text and links.
- If an item does not have a PDF, DOI, code repository, or slides, you can delete that link.
- If you later want automatic citation management, this page can be upgraded to use a `.bib` file without changing the rest of the site.
